cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Madam, this is Officer Kumar from the local police station. I'm calling regarding the incident you reported a few days ago. Sir, we need you to come down to the station to provide a witness statement.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 15s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A police officer calls a person to ask them to come to the police station as a witness for an incident they reported a few days ago. The officer is professional and provides a case reference number.
